Mohit Sharma Announces Retirement From All Cricket Formats

Dec 4, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Mohit Sharma’s Journey From Haryana to International Cricket

The 37-year-old expressed gratitude to fans and teammates, reflecting on his contributions in 26 ODIs and 8 T20Is for India.
